case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. ANGEL ARMANDO CABALLERO CARCAMO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CABALLERO CARCAMO, ANGEL ARMANDO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00, ON UNPAID LOAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CABALLERO CARCAMO, ANGEL ARMANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-08-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JAN-22-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CABALLERO CARCAMO, ANGEL ARMANDO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-08-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-08-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SANTA CASTILLO, SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE ASSOCIATE. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2018 - JUDGMENT.
